name: Second-Time Around Salmon and Rice Dinner
recipeIngredient: 2 poached salmon steaks, skin removed, bones removed, and cut into 1/2 inch cubes
2 portions cooked rice from the previous night
3 Kirby cukes, seeded, and sliced into half moons
1 small red bell pepper, seeded, finely diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss salmon and rice with most of the cucumbers and part or all of the mayonnaise.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Center on a bed of Boston lettuce; garnish with remaining cucumbers and red bell pepper.
4. Serve extra mayonnaise on the side if desired.
